authority: AxL责任定义字典_17A_68单元_机读版.md
JD业务变量字典_66槽位_机读版.md
purpose: This file defines a clean business-readable narrative. GAL and JD identifiers remain in structured review artifacts instead of being embedded in the prose.
coverage_slot_policy: For every selected A×L, use required_jd_ids from the active versioned GAL catalog. The list already includes inherited lower-level responsibility references.
paragraph_sequence: fixed workspace, business objective, objects, and task context
requested nominal behavior and continuity or update responsibility
available observations, variable values, and remaining TBD facts in business language
SUT, external executor, runtime dependency, and human responsibility boundaries
nominal process, disturbance or anomaly exposure, and prohibited answer leakage
required outputs, evidence, reporting, and external decision loops
task completion criteria, catalog versions, and all remaining TBD items
generation_rules: Emit every required JD slot even when the value is unknown.
Unknown values use null, status TBD, and an empty evidence quote.
The natural-language template follows the seven-paragraph sequence.
Every required JD slot appears in the structured jd_candidates table; the natural-language template does not expose internal JD or A×L identifiers.
Do not put A×L, GAL, jd-x.x, schema field names, or catalog implementation labels in the natural-language template.
Do not fill a TBD slot from a case example, prior answer, or general world knowledge.
Keep thresholds, business decisions, and simulator interfaces as TBD unless verbatim evidence exists.
